column2: 4 Inch Fire Rated Pot Light 9 Watts 810 Lumens 2 Hour Fire Rating,5 CCT Selectable, Dimmable
column3:
Safety and energy efficiency combined. This 4" Fire Rated Pot Light is an essential addition to any building where maintaining the integrity of fire separation is needed. Designed to outperform, this Dimmable Fire Rated Slim Downlight light emits an impressive 810 lumens, using only 9 watts.

This Fire Rated Recessed Light features a UL, Certified ro CSA standart , compliant 2-hour fire rating. That's right, not only will it brighten up your spaces, but it's also equipped to prevent the passage of flames and smoke, granting you unparalleled peace of mind.

Select from 5 Colour Temperatures, and dial in the brightness with its smooth dimming capabilities. Rated for wet locations, it can serve you flawlessly even in showers. Its IC rating ensures that this Fire Rated Down Light can contact insulation without a hitch, making it perfect for tight spaces.

column2: Freestanding Bathtub Drain Rough-in Kit
column3:
High Compatibility: This freestanding tub drain kit is designed to work with all freestanding, floor mounted, and island bathtubs. It can be installed securely on a variety of surfaces, including wood, cement, tile, and concrete, giving ultimate versatility for any bathroom setup.

Smooth Drainage Flow: The embedded bathtub rough-in kit is securely fixed between the base and the surface tiles, providing stable and reliable drainage. The dust lid shields the drain pipe during construction and allows multiple air pressure tests to ensure flawless performance.

Durable Materials: Featuring a corrosion-resistant brass pipe, this freestanding tub drain rough-in kit provides exceptional durability, keeping your bathtub securely in place for years of reliable performance.

Easy Installation: This stand alone tub drain kit comes with clear instructions and all the essential accessories, making installation quick and hassle-free.

Recommended Uses: This bathtub drain kit is ideal for plumbers, renovation contractors, builders, or DIY enthusiasts. It’s designed for easy installation on freestanding bathtubs, ensuring a smooth setup every time.

column2: 10" Wall Mounted 2 Way Pressure Balance Rainfall Shower System with Handheld Sprayer Brushed Gold
column3:
TOP QUALITY: This shower combo set contains only top-quality selected metal parts. The faucet body, 10 inch ultra-thin pressurized Rain shower head, 59 inches shower hose, wall mounted shower arm, shower holder even the embedded valve body are all made of brass material, which made it more durable than those made from stainless steel and plastic.

HIGH PRESSURE: High Pressure Shower Mixer Valve Cupc Certified, 9.4 Liters a minute , Max 80 PSI, ensure higher pressure water to the rain shower head and handheld and spout, the cartridge with cUPC certification, make sure you can enjoy a smooth shower even at low water pressure area

EASY INSTALLATION GUARANTEED: Designed to easily install with standard U.S / Canada plumbing connections, Standard 1/2" NPT tapered threads, CUPC Certified.

Warranty : Limited Lifetime Warranty.
